title: Slovakian Stir Fry
description: A traditional Slovakian dish made with salty and velvety elements. This recipe is a delicious combination of rice, noodles, and a savory stir fry.

ingredients.name: Noodles
ingredients.notes: Any type of noodle will work

ingredients.name: Slovakian stir
ingredients.notes: A type of stir fry sauce, you can also use a generic stir fry sauce

ingredients.name: Stick
ingredients.notes: Vegetable sticks, such as carrots or zucchini

ingredients.name: Salty
ingredients.notes: Salty seasoning, such as salt or soy sauce

instructions: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Boil the noodles in water until they are soft.
In a pan, heat the Slovakian stir on medium heat.
Add the vegetable sticks and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles and rice to the pan, and stir to combine.
Season with salty seasoning to taste.
